visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a man with brown hair wearing a white T-shirt. He is inside a brightly lit restaurant with warm wooden walls. He holds a reindeer burger in both hands, looking at the camera with an extremely shocked expression—wide eyes and a slightly open mouth. (2) A sharp cut leads to a close-up of the burger on a white plate. A small Norwegian flag is pinned to the top bun. The burger features a thick meat patty, greens, and pinkish onions. In the background, a small bowl of golden fries is visible on the wooden table. (3) The scene shifts to an outdoor urban setting during daylight. The man, now in a dark jacket, holds a giant, thick-glazed cinnamon roll. The background reveals European-style architecture and blurred figures of people sitting at outdoor café tables on a paved street. (4) A close-up displays the large cinnamon roll resting on a brown paper bag. The deep brown cinnamon swirls and glistening glaze are highly detailed, emphasizing the size of the pastry relative to the man's hands seen in the previous shot. (5) The man is now seen inside a convenience store or supermarket, wearing a green puffer-style jacket. He holds a blue plastic bottle of water with a look of pure disbelief. Behind him, shelves are densely packed with colorful snack products and drinks under bright fluorescent lights. (6) A close-up focuses on the water bottle being held. The label 'IMSDAL' is clearly legible. The man's thumb is visible gripping the side of the bottle, and the store's tile floor and shelving units are seen in the blurred background. (7) Transitioning to another location, the man holds an open white cardboard box containing several pieces of crispy, golden-brown fried chicken. He wears a dark jacket and maintains his exaggeratedly surprised facial expression. The setting appears to be a modern food court or casual eatery. (8) A detailed close-up shot shows the fried chicken inside the box, which is garnished with long, pale yellow pickled peppers. The crunchy texture of the breading and the slight sheen of oil on the peppers are clearly visible under the even indoor lighting. (9) The man stands outdoors in a different outfit, a light brown cardigan over a white shirt, holding a large croissant. The background is a flat, greyish wall or sidewalk. (10) A close-up of the croissant shows its flaky, golden-brown layers resting on a piece of brown parchment paper. A slice of cheese is partially visible tucked inside the pastry. (11) Back in a retail environment, the man wears a vibrant yellow cardigan and holds a small, red cylindrical can of Pringles chips. He stares directly into the lens with an intense, mock-serious expression. (12) A close-up highlights the small Pringles can, showing the iconic logo and the word 'Original.' A hand is visible holding the can against a backdrop of many identical red cans stacked on a shelf. (13) In a formal restaurant setting, the man holds a large white plate featuring a sophisticated arrangement of lamb chops, sausages, and broccoli. He has a wide-eyed, comical look of awe. The lighting is soft and warm. (14) A close-up showcases the plated lamb chops, revealing the grill marks on the meat and the bright green color of the steamed broccoli, all drizzled with a dark savory sauce. (15) The man is back in a shop, holding a Snickers bar. He wears a yellow cardigan and stands in front of a shelf stocked with various candy bars. (16) A close-up shows the Snickers bar being held horizontally. The background remains the blurred supermarket aisle with multiple other chocolate brands visible on the shelves. (17) The man holds a small McDonald's paper bag containing four golden-brown chicken nuggets. He wears a red beanie and a yellow cardigan, gesturing with his hands as if presenting a rare treasure. (18) A close-up shows the four chicken nuggets resting on the branded paper bag on a tray, with some fries visible in the corner of the frame. (19) The man is seated at a table, about to eat a large burger. He holds it with both hands, eyes wide. A cup of soda and a large container of fries are on the tray in front of him. (20) A close-up reveals the double beef burger, showing layers of patties, cheese, lettuce, and bacon between sesame seed buns. (21) Outdoors, the man wears a yellow beanie and a plaid shirt, holding a hot dog. (22) A close-up of the hot dog shows it topped with a vibrant red relish and crispy onions inside a soft bun. (23) The man holds a plate of seafood spaghetti featuring large mussels and shrimp in a restaurant with large windows. (24) A close-up of the pasta displays the rich red tomato sauce, several black mussels, and a whole shrimp, garnished with a lemon wedge. (25) The man wears a grey patterned sweater and holds a massive king crab leg up to his face in a bright restaurant. (26) A close-up shows several sections of the king crab legs on a plate, accompanied by a small bowl of creamy yellow dipping sauce and a lemon slice. (27) The man is seen using a spoon to eat a thick, reddish-brown seafood soup from a bowl. (28) A close-up of the soup shows chunks of shrimp and other seafood being lifted by the spoon. (29) The man holds a rectangular white plate with two pieces of salmon roe sushi, looking shocked at the camera. (30) A close-up focuses on the two pieces of gunkan maki, overflowing with bright orange salmon roe. (31) The man and a woman are seated at a restaurant table. He holds a small paper receipt and speaks animatedly with wide eyes and pointing gestures. She leans on her hand, looking at him. (32) The final close-up is of the receipt, specifically highlighting line items for food and wasabi, with the subtitle emphasizing the high cost of the condiment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：當你看到挪威的驚人物價. [Subtitle]: 馴鹿漢堡 700元. (2) [Subtitle]: 肉桂捲 150元. (3) [Subtitle]: 礦泉水 90元. (4) [Subtitle]: 炸雞 500元. (5) [Subtitle]: 可頌 210元. (6) [Subtitle]: 小品客 110元. (7) [Subtitle]: 羊排 1500元. (8) [Subtitle]: 巧克力 90元. (9) [Subtitle]: 4個雞塊 170元. (10) [Subtitle]: 雙層牛肉堡套餐 700元. (11) [Subtitle]: 熱狗堡 210元. (12) [Subtitle]: 海鮮義大利麵 810元. (13) [Subtitle]: 帝王蟹腳6根 3600元. (14) [Subtitle]: 海鮮湯 1150元. (15) [Subtitle]: 鮭魚卵壽司2貫 460元. (16) [Subtitle]: 哇沙米 240元. [Slogan]: 對！真的只有哇沙米！加哇沙米要另外加錢.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing in various outfits, 1 woman seated with him at the end, and several blurred background patrons.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A Taiwanese man with short brown hair, wearing a white T-shirt, a green puffer jacket, a light brown cardigan, a yellow cardigan with a red beanie, and a patterned grey sweater in different scenes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Vibrant and varied settings including an indoor wooden-themed restaurant, a European street with outdoor café seating, bright supermarket aisles stocked with global brands, a casual fast-food outlet, and a high-end dining room with white tablecloths.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy hip-hop or trap instrumental begins immediately with a prominent, synthesized sub-bass kick and rapid, crisp hi-hat patterns. A male vocalist raps in a mixture of Korean and English with a rhythmic, percussive flow that matches the fast visual editing. The tempo is approximately 98 BPM, creating a sense of urgency and excitement. (2) The rhythmic hip-hop track continues without interruption. The music features a consistent loop with bright, plucked synth textures and a deep bassline. The rapper's voice is processed with slight compression and reverb, maintaining a professional studio-quality sound that drives the upbeat mood of the video. (3) The dominant music track undergoes a sudden volume duck as a real-world vocal recording takes over. A male voice speaks in Mandarin with a highly animated and shocked tone. His pitch is high, and his delivery is fast, emphasizing surprise. The music remains as a very low background bed during this interaction. (4) The male speaker continues his excited commentary, his voice rising in pitch as he discusses a price on a receipt. A female voice responds briefly with a calm, affirmative tone. Ambient background noise from the restaurant, including subtle dish clinking and distant chatter, is audible under the dialogue. (5) The high-energy music swells back to full volume for a fraction of a second before the audio cuts out completely. The transition between the studio-produced music and the field-recorded dialogue is sharp and deliberate, marking a clear narrative shift from the list-based montage to a personal reaction.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> List-based -> Personal Talk: Hook -> Evidence List -> Final Reveal/Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous food vlog showcasing the exceptionally high cost of living in Norway. Through a fast-paced montage synchronized to upbeat music, it lists various food items and their converted prices in TWD to elicit shock and amusement from the audience. It concludes with a personal anecdote about a surprising surcharge for wasabi, reinforcing the theme of 'shocking prices'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses beat-synced editing to maintain high viewer engagement. The creator's signature exaggerated facial expressions are a key element of the comedic style.
